school_specific_admission_rule: Design admission route; verify the programme-specific call and applicant route before advising a student.

application_round.summary: School of Design Laurea admission is ranking-based around the TOLD/test route. The official 2026/2027 enrolment page reports the first ranking on 8 June 2026, enrolment by 10 June 2026 at 23:59 CEST, and interest expression by 11 June 2026 at 11:59 CEST. Later rankings/second phase must be checked in the call.

intake_semester_availability: September 2026 intake; other intakes not confirmed for this Laurea item [uncertain].
admission_outcome_type: not admitted / course full [uncertain wording varies by school]
ranking_methodology: Ranking/test methodology is school-specific; use the official Engineering, Design, Architecture, or partner call for scores, preferences, and tie-break rules [uncertain].
places_and_foreign_contingent: Check the official call for total places and reserved places; not resolved in this batch pass [uncertain].
academic_requirements: High school diploma with at least 12 years of education; foreign qualifications may need additional verification, foundation course, CIMEA/DoV, or country-specific checks. Admission test participation requirements also apply.
country_specific_eligibility: Foreign qualification eligibility must be checked through Polimi foreign-degree/foreign-qualification rules and country-specific documentation [uncertain].
curricular_integration_policy: Not generally applicable before Laurea admission; OFA/additional obligations may arise from test/language results [uncertain].
conditional_enrolment_policy: Candidates may have to enter/upload final secondary-school results by the official enrolment deadline; exact conditional rules depend on route and school.
language_requirements: For English-taught Laurea programmes, applicants must demonstrate English before enrolment. Accepted routes include English-official citizenship, qualification obtained in English, or recognised certification such as TOEFL iBT >= 59, IELTS >= 5, or Cambridge B2 First Grade C, subject to official validity rules.
language_submission_timing: Before enrolment for English-taught Laurea programmes; original/validated certificates may be checked by Polimi.
post_admission_italian_requirement: Italian is not an entry requirement for English-taught Laurea programmes, but Italian B2 must be obtained before completing the Bachelor; otherwise Italian OFA applies.

application_deadline_eu.summary: School of Design Laurea admission is ranking-based around the TOLD/test route. The official 2026/2027 enrolment page reports the first ranking on 8 June 2026, enrolment by 10 June 2026 at 23:59 CEST, and interest expression by 11 June 2026 at 11:59 CEST. Later rankings/second phase must be checked in the call.

application_deadline_non_eu.summary: International/reserved-place timing must be checked in the Design 2026/2027 call; use the official call for non-EU quota and ranking details [uncertain].

application_fee: Check official call and costs page; no stable programme-specific application fee resolved in this batch pass [uncertain].
visa_preenrolment_deadline: Non-EU visa/pre-enrolment deadline not resolved from checked Polimi sources in this batch pass [uncertain].
required_documents: English language proof for English-taught programmes
foreign-qualification documents and additional verification documents where applicable
document_translation_authentication: Foreign documents may require official verification, translation, CIMEA Statements or Declaration of Value depending on route; check official Polimi foreign-degree document rules [uncertain].
entry_exam_or_test: Design admission is handled through TOLD/test ranking lists; the 2026/2027 Design call is the governing source.
test_variant_and_session: Design admission is handled through TOLD/test ranking lists; the 2026/2027 Design call is the governing source.
test_score_conversion_or_threshold: Use the official test page/call for thresholds, conversion, and OFA triggers; SAT/TOL/TOLC/TOLD/ARCHED rules vary by school and phase [uncertain].
